macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: IMF Releases World Economic Outlook: Global Growth Downgraded to 3.1%
items.summary: The IMF downgraded global growth to 3.1% for 2026 from January forecasts, with headline inflation rising to 4.4%, amid risks from slowing growth, persistent inflation, interest rate uncertainty, and geopolitical tensions. Adverse scenarios project growth as low as 2% and inflation over 6% due to energy supply disruptions.

items.title: Fed Governor Barr Highlights Pressures on Rural Economy from Rising Costs and Tariffs
items.summary: Fed Governor Barr noted rising diesel prices up 50%, fertilizer costs up 55% due to Middle East conflict, and lower U.S. soybean exports to China by 38%, with higher tariffs on steel and aluminum increasing costs for farmers.

items.title: Upcoming Key US Economic Data and Fed Chair Powell Speech
items.summary: US economic calendar features Dallas Fed Manufacturing Index, Fed Chair Powell speech at 02:30 PM UTC, alongside recent data like Chicago PMI at 52.8, JOLTs Job Openings at 6.946M, and ADP Employment Change at 63K.

items.title: Middle East Conflict Drives Up Energy and Commodity Prices
items.summary: Sharp increases in oil, gas, diesel, jet fuel, fertilizer, aluminum, and helium prices due to Middle East tensions, acting as a negative supply shock with risks of wage-price spirals and tighter financial conditions.

items.title: US Blockade Against Iran Impacts Global Energy Markets
items.summary: Discussions on US blockade against Iran and its effects on energy markets, alongside Trump's tariffs on steel, aluminum, and copper, with refunds underway for previously imposed duties.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Surges Past $75,000 Amid Peace Negotiations Optimism
items.summary: Bitcoin rose 5% over the past 24 hours to around $75,000, with crypto markets betting that U.S.-Iran war negotiations are progressing toward peace. Ethereum gained even more, jumping 7% to nearly $2,400, reaching a two-month high.

items.title: Rare MACD Crossover Signal Flashes on Bitcoin Monthly Chart
items.summary: Bitcoin triggered a rare MACD crossover on its monthly chart—a technical signal that has historically preceded major altcoin rallies. The signal suggests potential significant moves for Ethereum, Cardano, and other altcoins.

items.title: Cardano Wallets Hit 4-Month High as Accumulation Accelerates
items.summary: The number of Cardano wallets holding at least 10 million ADA tokens surged to 424, a 4-month high representing a 5.2% increase over 9 weeks, signaling growing institutional interest.

items.title: Clarity Act Expected to Transform Crypto Market in July 2026
items.summary: Legislative changes coming in July are anticipated to shift $1 trillion in capital and unlock $100 trillion in U.S. pension funds for crypto investment, marking a transition from speculative to institutional-grade markets.

items.title: Western Union Advances Stablecoin Infrastructure on Solana
items.summary: Western Union is building blockchain infrastructure around its USD payment token (USDP) on the Solana network to modernize cross-border payments and connect on-chain value with real-world financial access.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Claude Code 2.0 Redesigned with New Features; Opus 4.7 Leaked
items.summary: Anthropic unveiled a major redesign of its Claude Code desktop app featuring a new 'routines' capability. Leaked reports indicate Claude Opus 4.7 may launch as early as this week, along with a new AI-powered tool for building websites and presentations.

items.title: OpenAI Launches Dedicated Cybersecurity Model
items.summary: OpenAI released a specialized cybersecurity model (GPT-5.4-CYBER) designed to compete directly with Anthropic's Claude Mythos in the enterprise security space.

items.title: Reinforcement Learning Emerges as Key to Agentic AI Intelligence
items.summary: Industry pioneers from Prime Intellect, Unsloth, and NVIDIA demonstrated how Reinforcement Learning (RL) is transforming autonomous agent capabilities beyond supervised fine-tuning, highlighting techniques like GRPO and RLVR for environment-grounded alignment.

items.title: AI Agent Landscape Shows Capability-Fragility Gap
items.summary: Insights from the AI Agents Summit Seattle revealed that while AI agents are more capable than marketed, they remain fragile, with a significant gap between intelligence and professional engineering maturity exposed in 2025.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
